title: astracantha lagowskii
intro: Astracantha lagowskii, also known as Astragalus lagurus or Lagowskii's milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Astracantha lagowskii include its potential to boost the immune system and reduce the risk of infections. Astracantha lagowskii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is commonly consumed to support overall health and well-being.
